name: Taylor Rivera
resume_text:
Taylor Rivera
Email: taylor.rivera.eval@example.com
Shift Operations Lead, Harbor Fulfillment, 2020-2025
Managed four shift leads and 38 associates across receiving and outbound packing. Tracked on-time ship rate, pick accuracy, and backlog aging. Led a slotting change that reduced average pick path time by 12 percent. Coordinated vendor issue logs for damaged inbound pallets and ran daily standups during peak season.
Operations Coordinator, Harbor Fulfillment, 2018-2020
Built weekly service-level reports in Excel and documented standard work updates.
Skills: team leadership, fulfillment operations, Excel reporting, continuous improvement, vendor coordination.
expected_risks: Safety incident handling is not described
human_notes: Good operations fit; needs interview validation on safety, quality, and people decisions.
